triples.subject: AB
triples.object: being a firm that clients can trust to deliver better outcomes
triples.sentence: At AB, we’re fully invested in being a firm that clients can trust to deliver better outcomes.

triples.subject: China
triples.object: cutting short- and long-term interest rates immediately after the Communist Party’s third plenary session in July
triples.sentence: China surprised markets by cutting short- and long-term interest rates immediately after the Communist Party’s third plenary session in July.
